name: maintenance-butler
description: Reclaim disk space by cleaning VS Code caches, logs, old extension versions, and workspace history

maintenanceButler.cleanCachedData.description: Clean CachedData — V8 bytecode cache. Auto-regenerated on next launch.

maintenanceButler.cleanCodeCache.description: Clean Code Cache — Chromium bytecode cache. Auto-regenerated.

maintenanceButler.cleanHttpCache.description: Clean HTTP Cache — network request cache. Like clearing browser cache.

maintenanceButler.cleanWebStorage.description: Clean WebStorage — webview asset cache. Auto-regenerated.

maintenanceButler.cleanGPUCaches.description: Clean GPU caches — GPUCache, DawnGraphiteCache, DawnWebGPUCache, VideoDecodeStats. Auto-regenerated.

maintenanceButler.cleanCrashpad.description: Clean Crashpad — crash dump files. Diagnostic only, no app impact.

maintenanceButler.cleanLogs.description: Clean logs — VS Code and extension host log files. Recreated on next launch.

maintenanceButler.cleanDuplicateExtensio.description: Old Extension Versions — removes older installed versions, keeps only the newest.

maintenanceButler.cleanObsoleteExtension.description: Process .obsolete file — deletes extension folders VS Code has already marked for removal.

maintenanceButler.cleanCachedExtensionVS.description: Clean CachedExtensionVSIXs — cached downloaded extension packages. VS Code re-downloads if needed.

maintenanceButler.cleanNetworkCache.description: Clean Network cache — minor re-initialization on next VS Code launch.

maintenanceButler.cleanServiceWorkerCach.description: Clean Service Worker cache — webview extensions re-fetch resources on next webview open.

maintenanceButler.cleanOrphanedWorkspace.description: ⚠️ Remove orphaned workspace storage — permanently deletes saved workspace state (open tabs, scroll positions, extension data) for project folders that no longer exist on disk.

maintenanceButler.cleanWorkspaceStorage.description: ⚠️ Workspace Storage picker — opens a list of all workspace states so you can choose which ones to permanently delete. Currently open workspace is excluded automatically.

maintenanceButler.cleanHistory.description: ⚠️ Remove old Local History entries (Timeline panel) — permanently deletes file snapshots older than historyMaxAgeDays. Cannot be recovered.

maintenanceButler.historyMaxAgeDays.description: Local History entries older than this many days will be deleted when cleanHistory is enabled.

maintenanceButler.dryRun.description: Dry run mode — reports what would be deleted without actually deleting anything.
